creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've also noticed for a while (couple of years, probably more -- time-tracking plays tricks with us during the pandemic) that small files become sporadically zeroed-out (size remains the same) on ext4fs-formatted Fedora 26 partition which I use under FreeBSD.  It's rather annoying, would be nice to have this bug fixed!

$ blkid /dev/linux_lvm/fedora-home
/dev/linux_lvm/fedora-home: UUID=[...] TYPE="ext4"
